title: Market strategy brief: invalid missing rejected paths
strategy_question: How should ProductOS win in a narrow PM workflow without skipping the option lineage?
category_definition: AI-assisted PM operating systems for traceable strategy and execution workflows.
market_role_goal: Win on traceability and decision quality over generic workspace breadth.
target_market_scope: B2B product teams that already feel recurring reconstruction cost.
offering_definition: A decision layer for PM workflows.
positioning_statement: ProductOS keeps strategy and evidence traceable enough to trust.
right_to_win: The repo-native surface preserves evidence and downstream linkage.
proof_requirements: PMs can review the packet faster than with current tools.
expansion_path: Expand from discovery into delivery planning.
key_risks: Broad suites may copy visible surfaces.
